rationale: Active war remains the dominant reality for Ukrainian residents; the US-Iran ceasefire confirmation continues as a background concern about US strategic attention, but no new qualitative change this cycle.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues — active combat ongoing
top_events.summary: The war continues at high intensity with no ceasefire or qualitative change; daily life in Ukraine remains defined by air strikes, mobilization, and infrastructure risk.

top_events.title: US, Iran confirm ceasefire; Trump signals Hormuz reopening
top_events.summary: The confirmed US-Iran deal raises continued concern that US strategic focus may shift away from Ukraine support, though no concrete aid reduction has been announced yet.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: A BBC report on Russian families using AI to recreate deceased soldiers reflects the human toll of the war but represents no change in the military or political situation for Ukrainians.
